title: Analyze & record the 4 candidate sources (CIViC, Open Targets, Reactome, PMC-OA); ≥1 approved
context: Before extraction can begin, the four candidate open sources must be analyzed for license/PD basis and the specific release pinned. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Analyze the four candidate sources (CIViC, Open Targets, Reactome, PMC-OA), record their license/PD basis and exact release in sources/allowlist.yml, and mark at least one as approved.
acceptanceCriteria: The 4 candidate sources analyzed with recorded license/PD basis + exact release; ≥1 marked approved.
Reactome and Open Targets licenses confirmed for the specific release (not assumed).
Anti-laundering controls referenced (passage/record-level citation, attestation, spot-checks).
output: Completed sources/allowlist.yml entries for the 4 candidate sources (≥1 approved) plus a rights-analysis note, committed via PR.
